title: WATCH: Choir's infectious rendition of ancient Irish language song
description: Never has seaweed sounded more appealing than it does in this rendition of "Dúlamán" by the Choral Scholars of University College Dublin.

title: Ancient Bronze Age axehead discovered on Forest walk
description: AN AXEHEAD which had been buried below the surface of a Forest wood for thousands of years was brought to light when a tree toppled over.

title: The village pub on ancient British road where you can get incredible Asian inspired tapas
description: The George near Rugby offers diners something unique

title: Portager discovers rare bison fossil south of city
description: What began as a routine autumn drive to photograph wildlife ended in a discovery that has provided the Manitoba Museum with its most complete specimen of an extinct bison species.
